name: market-square
summary: A working market — rows of canvas stalls, crates stacked between, produce carts, a well or fountain for a fixed point. Noisy, dense, defined by the stalls, not by buildings.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: square or 4:3 — aisles run between stall rows

accent.purpose: central plaza ring around the well or fountain

primary_palette.note: water well as the focal landmark
auction day — the block is the focus

story_prompts: market day at peak — every stall manned, crowd thick, a pickpocket working the crowd
dawn setup — half the stalls still going up, vendors arguing over pitches
a riot has broken out — stalls overturned, goods scattered, guards moving in
end of day, packing up — lanterns lit, most stalls empty, a drunk by the well
the market has been closed by plague order; stalls stand empty, goods rotting

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: outdoor daylight by default; evening scenes use 0.35-0.45 with warm torch tint

anti_patterns: perimeter is invisible walls (iw) — buildings at the edge are suggested, not modeled
stalls should form aisles, not a grid — leave room for crowds
don't skip scatter — a tidy market reads as closed; clutter = commerce
don't forget vertical interest — banners on poles, awning props, flag-poles break up the plane
